calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jul-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for Harold Minto.

Mr. Schneider stated that he has had no contact with the Client, that there are no assets and that he gave notice to all Parties of his intent to withdraw as Counsel. The Court informed Mr. Schneider that an inventory and a petition to terminate the estate based on absconding representative are needed. Status on filing on an inventory and appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to June 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for Harold Minto.

The Court informed Mr. Schneider that it is not inclined to relieve him as Counsel and that he needs to file a petition to terminate the estate based on absconding representative under Probate Code 10953. The Order to Appear is off calendar. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is denied (order to be prepared by the Court). Status on filing of an inventory and appraisal and petition for final distribution was continued to April 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Denied

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Jan-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on January 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)
